data.title: Boston Beer's Q2 revenue misses at $587.95M, EPS beats at $5.45. Truly, Sam Adams shipments decline while market share grows.
data.description: Boston Beer Company (NYSE: SAM) released their second-quarter financial results, reporting a revenue of $587.95 million, slightly below the estimated $596.43 million. The company's earnings for the quarter were $5.45 per share, surpassing the estimated $4.04 per share. The total revenue for the quarter saw a 1.5% increase, attributed to higher pricing and favorable product reception. The stock price of SAM can be found at the current market rates. For more details, the complete news article is accessible on Benzinga.com.

data.title: Korsail Energy launches Community Engagement Guidelines for transparent renewable energy development, improving trust and involvement.
data.description: On July 24, 2025 in Denver, Korsail Energy, a key player in the renewable energy sector, unveiled its updated Community Engagement Guidelines. These guidelines aim to bolster trust, enhance transparency, and guarantee meaningful community participation. The company's commitment to effective community engagement is evident in this structured framework that emphasizes listening to and involving communities in renewable energy projects.

data.title: B7-H4 therapies market to accelerate in 7MM from 2025-2040 due to cancer rise, B7-H4 awareness, and pipeline growth.
data.description: The B7-H4 targeted therapies market is expected to witness significant expansion in the upcoming years due to increasing cancer diagnoses, greater recognition of the B7-H4 biomarker, and a growing number of B7-H4-targeted treatments in clinical trials. This growth is driven by rising awareness and interest in B7-H4 as a potential therapeutic target in cancer treatment. Analysts predict a substantial increase in market size and demand for these therapies, with revenues projected to ramp up significantly as the market matures, reaching significant figures in the near future.

data.title: Boise will host up to 50,000 Basque visitors for Jaialdi festival every five years, turning it into Basque capital.
data.description: BOISE, Idaho - On July 24, 2025, Boise, Idaho once again transformed into the Basque capital of America for Jaialdi, a festival that occurs every five years. The event saw a gathering of up to 50,000 individuals belonging to the Basque ethnic group, coming to Boise to celebrate their culture and heritage. The term "Jaialdi" translates to "festival" in the Basques' Euskara language. This year's event attracted individuals from various regions, including a significant number from Seattle.

data.title: Genuine Article in Texas wins Silver for PR Agency of the Year at the Ad Age Small Agency Awards.
data.description: A communications firm headquartered in Texas has been recognized as the PR Agency of the Year by Ad Age. Genuine Article, based in Dallas-Fort Worth and Austin, received the Silver award at the Ad Age Small Agency Awards event. This honor highlights the firm's outstanding work and accomplishments in the industry.

data.title: Generative AI is boosting the energy sector with high demand, attracting investments.
data.description: An expert points out that the power demands of Generative AI present a strong opportunity for energy-related investments. This technology is driving significant demand in a sector that is often overlooked, providing a favorable environment for investment growth.

data.title: Edwards Lifesciences stock surged 8% after beating Q2 forecasts and raising guidance, according to Investor's Business Daily.
data.description: Shares of Edwards Lifesciences surged by 8% in after-hours trading on Thursday following the company's better-than-expected second-quarter results and raised guidance. The medtech company surpassed quarterly forecasts, leading to a favorable outlook.

data.title: Intel beat low Q2 revenue expectations, facing a loss. Stock fluctuated after hours.
data.description: During the second quarter, Intel exceeded revenue expectations despite reporting an unexpected loss. The company's stock showed fluctuations in after-hours trading. Intel surpassed anticipated sales figures but incurred a surprise deficit. This performance was reflected in the company's stock behavior during late trading hours.

data.title: Sarepta stock plunges on FDA requiring more clinical tests for Elevidys, raising concerns among investors.
data.description: Sarepta's stock faced a significant drop on Thursday following news that the FDA is demanding more clinical tests to confirm the safety of Elevidys. This setback has raised concerns among investors, with the company experiencing a series of challenges recently. This development is viewed as setting a worrisome precedent for Sarepta.

data.title: IBM stock fell despite strong earnings in Q2; under scrutiny.
data.description: On Thursday, IBM experienced a decline in stock value, despite the company's second-quarter results surpassing projections. Even though the tech giant reported strong earnings, its stock price dropped. This decline is notable given the positive performance of IBM in the quarter.

data.title: EZCORP will release Q3 FY 2025 results on July 30, 2025, after market close. They are a leading pawn transaction provider.
data.description: On July 24, 2025, EZCORP, Inc. (NASDAQ: EZPW), a top pawn transaction provider in the US and Latin America, announced that it will release its third quarter fiscal 2025 results (covering the period until June 30, 2025) on Wednesday, July 30, 2025, post-market closure.
